properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a King seated among us Let every heart receive Him now Where there is praise, He will inhabit There will be grace and mercy all around

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every burden will be lifted in His presence Every trophy will be laid down at His feet There is a name that reigns above all others Jesus Christ, the King above all kings

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Unto the Lamb, honor and glory Worthy is He who overcame Buried in shame, risen in power He is alive and the stone is rolled away

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All our worship will belong to Him forever Death is conquered, and our Saviour holds the keys There is a name that reigns above all others Jesus Christ, the King above all kings

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It won't be long, we will behold Him And every tear, He'll wipe away We'll be at home, the war will be over Soon we will meet our Saviour face to face

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And every burden will be lifted in His presence Every trophy will be laid down at His feet There is a name that reigns above all others Jesus Christ, the King above all kings

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And all our worship will belong to You forever Holy, holy, for all eternity Yours is the name that reigns above all others Jesus Christ, the King above all kings

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Jesus Christ, the King above all kings
